name: @agent-tool-lite/file
description: Filesystem helpers ported from Claude Code (readFileInRange, sync file read with metadata)

scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test test-dist/read-file-in-range.test.js test-dist/file-read-sync.test.js test-dist/read-file-in-range-tool.test.js test-dist/format-file-size.test.js test-dist/safe-resolve-path.test.js test-dist/file-write.test.js test-dist/file-write-tool.test.js test-dist/file-edit.test.js test-dist/file-edit-tool.test.js test-dist/roots-file-watch.test.js
